prompt: A cinematic photo of the merchant bursting through a doorway in Renaissance Florence in a total loss of dignity, captured at the peak of motion. He lunges inside clutching the leather satchel, coat and limbs thrown off-balance by urgency, as though arriving one second before disaster. The entrance is modest and institutional rather than grand, which sharpens the joke. Strong forward momentum, crisp historical architecture, natural light, photoreal detail, comic climax of the false high-stakes premise.

references.label: Merchant
references.notes: Only visible character; match face, clothing, satchel, and panicked physicality.
